d.t: Gặp người mới sau chuyến đi

e.p: Where are you from?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói nơi bạn sống. 2) Nói bạn có thường đi du lịch không (always/often/sometimes).
e.h: S + be + place; S + V(s) + adv of freq
e.s: I'm from [studentCity]. I often travel.

e.p: What do you like about travelling?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói một điều bạn thích. 2) Nói bạn want to do it again or not.
e.h: I like + N; I want + to V
e.s: I like new food. I want to travel again.

e.p: How many photos do you have from the trip?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói số ảnh (There are + số + photos). 2) Nói bạn look at them often or not.
e.h: There are + number + N; adv of freq
e.s: There are ten photos. I sometimes look at them.

e.p: Are you staying in a hotel now?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no và nói nơi bạn ở (hotel/home). 2) Nói bạn like staying there or not.
e.h: Be + V-ing or Be + place; I like + N
e.s: No, I'm at home. I like being at home.

e.p: Do you need a map or phone for directions?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói bạn need a map hoặc phone. 2) Nói bạn use it often when travelling.
e.h: I need + N; S + V(s) + adv of freq
e.s: I need a phone. I always use it when travelling.

d.t: Nói về nơi đẹp bạn thấy

e.p: What place do you like there?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói tên nơi (city/place). 2) Nói vì sao bạn like it (one short reason).
e.h: S + like + N; S + V(s) + reason
e.s: I like the beach. It is very calm.

e.p: Is the place hot or cold now?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói nhiệt độ hiện tại (hot/cold). 2) Nói bạn often feel comfortable there or not.
e.h: It is + adj; S + V(s) + adv of freq
e.s: It is hot. I sometimes feel comfortable there.

e.p: How many people are there with you?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói số người (There are + số + people). 2) Nói bạn like going with friends or family.
e.h: There are + number + N; I like + N
e.s: There are three people. I like going with friends.

e.p: Do you want to stay longer?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no + lý do ngắn. 2) Nói bạn need something (rest/more time).
e.h: I want/need + N/to V; give short reason
e.s: Yes, I want to stay longer. I need more rest.

e.p: Are you taking pictures of the place?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói bạn often take photos when you travel.
e.h: Be + V-ing; S + V(s) + adv of freq
e.s: Yes, I'm taking pictures. I often take photos when I travel.

d.t: Kể về món ăn bạn thử

e.p: Do you like the local food?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói bạn like one dish (name) or not.
e.h: I like + N; short reason
e.s: Yes, I like the local food. I like the spicy soup.

e.p: How often do you eat street food?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói tần suất (always/often/sometimes). 2) Nói you prefer street food or restaurant.
e.h: S + V(s) + adv of freq; I prefer + N
e.s: I often eat street food. I prefer street food to restaurants.

e.p: Are you trying new drinks there?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói bạn want to try more or not.
e.h: Be + V-ing; I want + to V
e.s: Yes, I'm trying new drinks. I want to try more flavors.

e.p: How much does a meal usually cost there?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói giá chung (use 'It is' + adj or 'A meal is' + number with dollars). 2) Nói you think it's cheap or expensive.
e.h: A meal is + number; It is + adj
e.s: A meal is five dollars. It is cheap.

e.p: Would you like to cook a local dish at home?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói bạn need ingredients or help.
e.h: I would like/I want + to V; I need + N
e.s: Yes, I would like to cook it. I need simple ingredients.

d.t: Nói về chỗ ở khi đi chơi

e.p: Are you in a hotel or at a friend's place?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói nơi bạn ở (hotel/friend's). 2) Nói you like it or not.
e.h: Be + place; I like + N
e.s: I'm in a small hotel. I like it.

e.p: How many rooms are there in your place?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói số phòng (There are + số + rooms). 2) Nói you need more space or it's enough.
e.h: There are + number + N; I need/It's + adj
e.s: There are two rooms. It's enough for me.

e.p: Is it near the city center?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no và nói vị trí (near/far). 2) Nói bạn often walk to places or not.
e.h: Be + near/far; S + V(s) + adv of freq
e.s: Yes, it is near the city center. I sometimes walk to places.

e.p: Do you want a room with a view?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói bạn like sea/mountain view (one word).
e.h: I want + N/to V; I like + N
e.s: Yes, I want a sea view. I like the sea.

e.p: Are you staying for a long time?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói thời gian ngắn/dài (short/long). 2) Nói bạn need rest or activities.
e.h: I'm staying + short/long; I need + N
e.s: I'm staying for a short time. I need rest.

d.t: Kỷ niệm cuối tuần vừa rồi

e.p: Do you have a good memory from last weekend?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói one short reason why.
e.h: Yes/No + short reason (present simple)
e.s: Yes, I have a good memory. I remember the nice weather.

e.p: Are you doing any photos from that weekend now?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói bạn look at them often or sometimes.
e.h: Be + V-ing; S + V(s) + adv of freq
e.s: Yes, I'm looking at photos. I sometimes look at them.

e.p: How many friends are with you usually on weekends?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói số người (There are + number + friends). 2) Nói bạn often meet them on weekends.
e.h: There are + number + N; adv of freq
e.s: There are two friends. I often meet them on weekends.

e.p: Do you want to go back to the place from last weekend?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you need time or money to return.
e.h: I want + to V / I need + N
e.s: Yes, I want to go back. I need more time.

e.p: Are you telling stories about it to your family?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you tell them often or sometimes.
e.h: Be + V-ing; S + V(s) + adv of freq
e.s: Yes, I'm telling stories. I sometimes tell them.

d.t: Chuẩn bị hành lý cho chuyến đi

e.p: Do you need a big suitcase?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói bạn need clothes or only small things.
e.h: I need + N; short reason
e.s: Yes, I need a big suitcase. I need many clothes.

e.p: How much luggage do you usually bring?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói lượng (It is + small/big) hoặc number. 2) Nói you always pack early or late.
e.h: It is + adj; S + V(s) + adv of freq
e.s: It is small. I always pack early.

e.p: Are you packing light or heavy today?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói light/heavy. 2) Nói you want to travel easy or not.
e.h: I'm + adj; I want + to V
e.s: I'm packing light. I want to travel easy.

e.p: Do you need help with your bags?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói who helps you (friend/family) or you do it yourself.
e.h: I need/I don't need; say helper
e.s: No, I don't need help. I carry bags myself.

e.p: Are you putting medicines in your bag?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you need them always or sometimes.
e.h: Be + V-ing; S + V(s) + adv of freq
e.s: Yes, I'm putting medicines. I sometimes need them.

d.t: Di chuyển khi du lịch

e.p: Do you like travelling by bus or by plane?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói phương tiện bạn thích. 2) Nói bạn often use it.
e.h: I like + N; S + V(s) + adv of freq
e.s: I like travelling by bus. I often use the bus.

e.p: Are you taking a train now?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói bạn prefer trains or cars.
e.h: Be + V-ing; I prefer + N
e.s: No, I'm not taking a train. I prefer cars.

e.p: How many hours is your trip usually?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói số giờ (It is + number + hours). 2) Nói you need rest during travel or not.
e.h: It is + number + hours; I need + N
e.s: It is two hours. I need rest during travel.

e.p: Do you want a window seat?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói bạn like the view or sleep.
e.h: I want + N; I like + N/to V
e.s: Yes, I want a window seat. I like the view.

e.p: Are you paying for tickets online?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you often buy tickets online or not.
e.h: Be + V-ing; S + V(s) + adv of freq
e.s: Yes, I'm paying online. I often buy tickets online.

d.t: Mua quà lưu niệm

e.p: Do you want a souvenir?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói bạn want a small or big gift.
e.h: I want + N; use small/big
e.s: Yes, I want a souvenir. I want a small gift.

e.p: How many souvenirs do you buy usually?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói số lượng (There are + number or I buy + number). 2) Nói you give them to friends or keep.
e.h: There are + number / I buy + number; I give/keep + N
e.s: I buy two souvenirs. I give them to friends.

e.p: Are you looking for local crafts?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you like handmade items or not.
e.h: Be + V-ing; I like + N
e.s: Yes, I'm looking for local crafts. I like handmade items.

e.p: Do you need a bag for the gifts?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you need one big or small bag.
e.h: I need + N; use big/small
e.s: Yes, I need a bag. I need a small bag.

e.p: Are you paying cash or card?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói cash/card. 2) Nói you always carry cash or not.
e.h: I pay + cash/card; S + V(s) + adv of freq
e.s: I pay by card. I sometimes carry cash.

d.t: Thời tiết và ảnh hưởng lên chuyến đi

e.p: Is the weather good there now?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói thời tiết (good/bad/hot/cold). 2) Nói you like this weather or not.
e.h: It is + adj; I like + N
e.s: It is hot. I like this weather.

e.p: Do you often check weather before travelling?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói bạn always/usually/sometimes check it.
e.h: Yes/No + short reason; adv of freq
e.s: Yes, I check weather. I usually check it.

e.p: How many rainy days are there in this season?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói số ngày mưa (There are + number + rainy days). 2) Nói you need umbrella or not.
e.h: There are + number + N; I need + N
e.s: There are five rainy days. I need an umbrella.

e.p: Are you wearing warm clothes now?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you prefer warm or light clothes.
e.h: Be + V-ing; I prefer + N
e.s: No, I'm not wearing warm clothes. I prefer light clothes.

e.p: Do you want sunny days for your trip?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you need sun for beach or not.
e.h: I want + N/to V; short reason
e.s: Yes, I want sunny days. I need sun for the beach.

d.t: Bạn đồng hành trong chuyến đi

e.p: Are you travelling with family or friends?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói với ai (family/friends). 2) Nói bạn like travelling with them or not.
e.h: I'm with + N; I like + N
e.s: I'm with friends. I like travelling with them.

e.p: How many people travel with you usually?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói số người (There are + number + people). 2) Nói you often go with the same people.
e.h: There are + number + N; S + V(s) + adv of freq
e.s: There are four people. I often go with the same people.

e.p: Is someone helping you plan the trip?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói who helps (friend/family) or you plan alone.
e.h: Yes/No + short info; say helper
e.s: Yes, a friend helps me. We plan together.

e.p: Do you enjoy quiet trips or busy trips?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói preference (quiet/busy). 2) Nói you often choose that style.
e.h: I enjoy + N; S + V(s) + adv of freq
e.s: I enjoy quiet trips. I often choose quiet trips.

e.p: Are your friends staying nearby?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói they live in the same city or not.
e.h: Be + near/far; say city or not
e.s: Yes, they are nearby. They live in the same city.

d.t: Hoạt động yêu thích khi đi du lịch

e.p: What activity do you like on trips?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói một hoạt động (swim/walk/visit). 2) Nói you do it often or sometimes.
e.h: I like + V-ing/N; S + V(s) + adv of freq
e.s: I like to walk. I often walk on trips.

e.p: Are you joining tours or exploring alone?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói tour/alone. 2) Nói you prefer one more.
e.h: I join/I explore; I prefer + N
e.s: I explore alone. I prefer exploring alone.

e.p: How many places do you visit in a day?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói số (I visit + number). 2) Nói you find this enough or too many.
e.h: I visit + number; It is + adj
e.s: I visit three places. It is enough for me.

e.p: Do you want to try local classes (cooking/dance)?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you need to book or you join easily.
e.h: I want/I don't want; I need + N or I can + V
e.s: Yes, I want to try a cooking class. I need to book early.

e.p: Are you taking time to rest each day?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you always rest or sometimes skip rest.
e.h: Be + V-ing; S + V(s) + adv of freq
e.s: Yes, I'm resting each day. I always rest during trips.

d.t: Ảnh và nhật ký chuyến đi

e.p: Do you keep a travel diary?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you write often or sometimes.
e.h: Yes/No + short reason; adv of freq
e.s: Yes, I keep a travel diary. I sometimes write in it.

e.p: How many photos do you take a day?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói số ảnh (I take + number). 2) Nói you save them on phone or computer.
e.h: I take + number; I save + N on + place
e.s: I take twenty photos. I save them on my phone.

e.p: Are you sharing photos on social media?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you share often or rarely.
e.h: Be + V-ing; S + V(s) + adv of freq
e.s: Yes, I'm sharing photos. I rarely share many.

e.p: Do you like writing short notes about places?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you write short notes often.
e.h: I like + V-ing; S + V(s) + adv of freq
e.s: Yes, I like writing notes. I often write short notes.

e.p: Are there many pictures on your wall from trips?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói số (There are + number + pictures). 2) Nói you look at them often or sometimes.
e.h: There are + number + N; adv of freq
e.s: There are five pictures on my wall. I sometimes look at them.

d.t: Kỷ niệm đáng nhớ

e.p: Do you have a memorable moment from travel?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói một từ miêu tả cảm xúc (happy/sad).
e.h: Yes/No + short reason; use emotion word
e.s: Yes, I have a memorable moment. I feel happy.

e.p: Are you telling others about that story now?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói bạn often tell it or sometimes.
e.h: Be + V-ing; S + V(s) + adv of freq
e.s: Yes, I'm telling the story. I sometimes tell it.

e.p: How many times do you remember that moment each year?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói số lần (I remember + number times). 2) Nói you think about it often.
e.h: I remember + number + times; adv of freq
e.s: I remember it three times a year. I think about it often.

e.p: Do you want to share photos of that moment?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you post them or keep private.
e.h: I want/I don't want; I post/keep private
e.s: Yes, I want to share photos. I post some online.

e.p: Are you planning to visit the same place again?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói bạn need time or money to return.
e.h: I want + to V; I need + N
e.s: Yes, I want to visit again. I need more money.

d.t: Vấn đề nhỏ khi đi du lịch

e.p: Are you looking for help now?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói bạn need help with map or bag.
e.h: Be + V-ing; I need + N
e.s: No, I'm not looking for help. I need only a map.

e.p: Do you often lose small things on trips?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you sometimes forget keys or phone.
e.h: S + V(s) + adv of freq; name small items
e.s: Sometimes I lose small things. I sometimes forget my phone.

e.p: How many times do you check your bags a day?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói số lần (I check + number times). 2) Nói you always check before leaving.
e.h: I check + number + times; I always + V
e.s: I check my bags two times a day. I always check before leaving.

e.p: Is someone helping if you have a problem?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói who helps (staff/friend).
e.h: Yes/No + helper; name helper
e.s: Yes, staff help me. A friend also helps.

e.p: Do you need to call a service now?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói bạn want them to come or give advice.
e.h: I need/I don't need; I want + to V
e.s: No, I don't need a service. I want only advice.

d.t: Kế hoạch cho chuyến đi tiếp theo

e.p: Do you want to travel next month?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you want to go to beach or city.
e.h: I want + to V; name place
e.s: Yes, I want to travel next month. I want to go to the city.

e.p: How many days will you stay usually?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói số ngày (I stay + number + days). 2) Nói you think it's enough.
e.h: I stay + number + days; It is + adj
e.s: I stay three days. It is enough.

e.p: Are you saving money for the trip?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói bạn often save or sometimes.
e.h: I am saving / I save; adv of freq
e.s: Yes, I'm saving money. I often save for trips.

e.p: Do you want to go with the same friends?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you like traveling with them or prefer alone.
e.h: I want + N/to V; I prefer + N/to + N
e.s: Yes, I want to go with the same friends. I like traveling with them.

e.p: Are you booking tickets now?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you often book early or late.
e.h: Be + V-ing; S + V(s) + adv of freq
e.s: No, I'm not booking now. I sometimes book early.

d.t: Nói ngắn về chi phí chuyến đi

e.p: Is the trip expensive?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you think it is cheap/expensive.
e.h: Yes/No + short reason; It is + adj
e.s: Yes, the trip is expensive. I think it is costly.

e.p: How much money do you need for a day?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói số tiền (It is + number + dollars). 2) Nói you need cash or card.
e.h: It is + number; I need + cash/card
e.s: It is ten dollars a day. I need cash and card.

e.p: Do you often spend money on food or activities?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói bạn spend on food/activities. 2) Nói you prefer one more.
e.h: I spend on + N; I prefer + N
e.s: I spend money on food. I prefer food to activities.

e.p: Are there cheap options for transport?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you use them often or not.
e.h: Yes/No + short info; adv of freq
e.s: Yes, there are cheap buses. I often use them.

e.p: Do you need to budget carefully?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you always plan a budget or sometimes.
e.h: I need/I don't need; S + V(s) + adv of freq
e.s: Yes, I need to budget carefully. I always plan a budget.

d.t: Thói quen khi về nhà sau chuyến đi

e.p: Do you clean your clothes after a trip?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you do it immediately or later.
e.h: Yes/No + short reason; I do it + time
e.s: Yes, I clean my clothes. I do it immediately.

e.p: Are you telling friends about your trip now?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you often share highlights or small details.
e.h: Be + V-ing; S + V(s) + adv of freq
e.s: Yes, I'm telling friends about the trip. I often share highlights.

e.p: How many souvenirs do you keep at home?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói số (There are + number + souvenirs). 2) Nói you put them in a box or on shelf.
e.h: There are + number + N; I put + N on/in + place
e.s: There are four souvenirs. I put them on a shelf.

e.p: Do you plan the next trip right away?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you sometimes plan immediately or wait.
e.h: I plan/I don't plan; adv of freq
e.s: No, I don't plan right away. I sometimes wait.

e.p: Are you sharing photos with family now?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you send them online or show in person.
e.h: Be + V-ing; I send/show + N
e.s: Yes, I'm sharing photos with family. I send them online.

d.t: Tương tác với người địa phương

e.p: Do you speak with local people?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you often try to talk or not.
e.h: Be + V-ing; S + V(s) + adv of freq
e.s: Yes, I speak with local people. I often try to talk.

e.p: How many words of local language do you know?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói số từ (I know + number words). 2) Nói you use them often.
e.h: I know + number + words; S + V(s) + adv of freq
e.s: I know five words. I use them sometimes.

e.p: Are you learning a few phrases now?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you need a phrasebook or phone app.
e.h: Be + V-ing; I need + N
e.s: Yes, I'm learning phrases. I need a phone app.

e.p: Do you like friendly locals?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you often meet friendly people.
e.h: I like + N; S + V(s) + adv of freq
e.s: Yes, I like friendly locals. I often meet friendly people.

e.p: Are there helpful signs in English?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you find them useful.
e.h: Yes/No + short info; I find + N + useful
e.s: Yes, there are helpful signs in English. I find them useful.

d.t: Ăn uống cuối tuần và kỷ niệm

e.p: Do you often try special dishes on weekends?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you sometimes cook them at home.
e.h: S + V(s) + adv of freq; I sometimes + V
e.s: Yes, I often try special dishes. I sometimes cook them at home.

e.p: How many new dishes do you try on a trip?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói số (I try + number dishes). 2) Nói you like one dish most.
e.h: I try + number + N; I like + N most
e.s: I try three dishes. I like the soup most.

e.p: Are you eating at the market now?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you prefer market food or restaurants.
e.h: Be + V-ing; I prefer + N
e.s: Yes, I'm eating at the market. I prefer market food.

e.p: Do you want to bring back recipes?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you need notes or photos of the dish.
e.h: I want/I don't want; I need + N
e.s: Yes, I want to bring back recipes. I need notes and photos.

e.p: Are there many restaurants near your place?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói số (There are + number + restaurants). 2) Nói you go to them often or sometimes.
e.h: There are + number + N; S + V(s) + adv of freq
e.s: There are many restaurants. I often go to them.

d.t: Ôn tập: Kể nhanh một chuyến đi

e.p: Can you tell one short thing about your trip now?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói một điều bạn nhớ nhất. 2) Nói bạn like it or not.
e.h: I remember + N; I like + N
e.s: I remember the blue sea. I like it very much.

e.p: Are you showing a photo from that trip?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói how many people are in the photo (There are + số).
e.h: Be + V-ing; There are + number + N
e.s: Yes, I'm showing a photo. There are three people in it.

e.p: Do you want to go back to that place?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói bạn need time or money.
e.h: I want + to V; I need + N
e.s: Yes, I want to go back. I need more time.

e.p: How often do you think about that trip?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói tần suất (always/often/sometimes). 2) Nói you tell friends about it or keep quiet.
e.h: S + V(s) + adv of freq; I tell/keep
e.s: I often think about that trip. I tell friends about it.

e.p: Are you happy with your travel memories?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói bạn feel good or want to change something.
e.h: Yes/No + short reason; use feel + adj
e.s: Yes, I'm happy with my travel memories. I feel good.

d.t: Ôn tập: Kể về cuối tuần

e.p: Do you often relax on weekends?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói bạn relax at home or go out.
e.h: S + V(s) + adv of freq; at home/go out
e.s: Yes, I often relax on weekends. I relax at home.

e.p: Are you meeting friends this weekend?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói bạn meet them often or sometimes.
e.h: Be + V-ing; S + V(s) + adv of freq
e.s: No, I'm not meeting friends this weekend. I sometimes meet them.

e.p: How many hours do you rest on a weekend day?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Nói số giờ (I rest + number + hours). 2) Nói you feel better after rest.
e.h: I rest + number + hours; I feel + adj
e.s: I rest three hours. I feel better after rest.

e.p: Do you want to plan an activity now?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you prefer quiet or active plans.
e.h: I want/I don't want; I prefer + N
e.s: Yes, I want to plan an activity. I prefer quiet plans.

e.p: Are you taking a short trip this weekend?
e.m: Viết 2 câu: 1) Trả lời yes/no. 2) Nói you need a small bag or big suitcase.
e.h: Be + V-ing; I need + small/big + N
e.s: No, I'm not taking a short trip. I need only a small bag.
